final_prompt.prompt:
Generate a 9:16 vertical screenshot of a Douyin livestream featuring a female streamer called "神仙姐姐".

Style/medium: vertical mobile screenshot, UI mockup with livestream interface elements, social media aesthetic
Composition: 9:16 vertical aspect ratio, full-screen phone interface with streamer centered in frame, typical livestream overlay layout
Subject: female streamer "神仙姐姐" holding a sign, elegant appearance, engaging expression facing camera
Scene/backdrop: livestream room interior with soft bokeh background, Douyin UI elements visible (viewer count, comments, gift buttons)
Lighting/mood: soft ring light illumination on face, warm and inviting atmosphere typical of beauty livestreams
Color palette: warm skin tones as anchor, soft pink and white UI accents, neutral background
Text (verbatim): "今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！"
Constraints: must include realistic Douyin livestream interface elements; sign text must be clearly readable; 9:16 vertical format
Avoid: distorted facial features, blurry text, cluttered composition, watermark from other platforms, over-processed filter look
